title: strychnos campicola
intro: Strychnos campicola, also known as the bush tomato tree or the African bush tomato, is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae. The medicinal properties of Strychnos campicola include its use as an anti-inflammatory and analgesic agent, as well as its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The health benefits associated with this plant include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body against oxidative stress and cell damage. The herbal preparations of Strychnos campicola often involve boiling the roots or leaves to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
